recommendations.title: Mario
recommendations.overview: Two young gay soccer players get caught up between the politics of the game and the politics of love.

recommendations.title: The Glenn Miller Story
recommendations.overview: A vibrant tribute to one of America's legendary bandleaders, charting Glenn Miller's rise from obscurity and poverty to fame and wealth in the early 1940s.

recommendations.title: The Escort
recommendations.overview: Desperate for a good story, a sex-addicted journalist throws himself into the world of high-class escorts when he starts following a Stanford-educated prostitute.

recommendations.title: Gabriel's Inferno
recommendations.overview: An intriguing and sinful exploration of seduction, forbidden love, and redemption, Gabriel's Inferno is a captivating and wildly passionate tale of one man's escape from his own personal hell as he tries to earn the impossible--forgiveness and love.

recommendations.title: Chaplin
recommendations.overview: An aged Charlie Chaplin narrates his life to his autobiography's editor, including his rise to wealth and comedic fame from poverty, his turbulent personal life and his run-ins with the FBI.

recommendations.title: Only You
recommendations.overview: The passionate love between a former boxer and a beautiful blind woman.

recommendations.title: Royalteen
recommendations.overview: A teenager struggles to keep her scandal-ridden past and a big secret from getting out when she strikes up an unlikely romance with the crown prince.

recommendations.title: Seriously Single
recommendations.overview: While her free-living bestie urges her to embrace singlehood, a commitment-craving social media expert can't stop following the life of a former love.

recommendations.title: Code Unknown
recommendations.overview: A series of events unfold like a chain reaction, all stemming from a minor event that brings the film's five characters together. Set in Paris, France, Anne is an actress whose boyfriend Georges photographs the war in Kosovo. Georges' brother, Jean,

recommendations.title: The French Kissers
recommendations.overview: An awkward adolescent boy and his angst-ridden friends try their best to fit in amongst a cast of varied characters.
